¼iz'kklu½ [foKkiu&III@4@vlk-@375@122] -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART III—SEC. 4] ikn fVIi.kh% ikn fVIi.kh% ikn fVIi.kh% ikn fVIi.kh% ewy fofu;e vf/klwpuk la- ,u,p,vkj&12011@1@95&iz'kk-] rjh[k 11 ekpZ] 1996 }kjk Hkkjr ds jkti=] vlk/kkj.k] Hkkx III] [k.M 4] rkjh[k 11 ekpZ] 1996 esa izdkf'kr fd, x, Fks rFkk buesa xr la'kks/ku vf/klwpuk la 11012@248@2015&iz'kk-] rkjh[k 16 uoEcj] 2015] tks Hkkjr ds jkti=] vlk/kkj.k] Hkkx III, [k.M 4] rkjh[k 19 uoEcj] 2015] esa izdkf'kr dh xbZ Fkh] }kjk fd;k x;k Fkk A Li"Vhdj.k Kkiu Li"Vhdj.k Kkiu Li"Vhdj.k Kkiu Li"Vhdj.k Kkiu bl la'kks/ku dh vf/klwpuk ls igys dj yh xbZ vFkok djus ls yksi djk nh xbZ fdlh ckr ij bl la'kks/ku ds iz[;kiu ls dksbZ izHkko ugha iM+sxk A NATIONAL HIGHWAYS AUTHORITY OF INDIA NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 15th February, 2016 The National Highways Authority of India (Recruitment, Seniority and Promotion) Amendment Regulations, 2016 No. 11012/248/2015-Admn.–In exercise of the powers conferred by section 35, read with section 9, of the National Highways Authority of India Act, 1988 (68 of 1988), the National Highways Authority of India hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the National Highways Authority of India (Recruitment, Seniority and Promotion) Regulations, 1996, namely: - 1. Short title and commencement:-—(1) These regulations may be called the National Highways Authority of India (Recruitment, Seniority and Promotion) Amendment Regulations, 2016. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Schedule to the National Highways Authority of India (Recruitment, Seniority and Promotion) Regulations, 1996:— (a) against the post of Chief General Manager (Technical), in column 2, for the heading and entry, the following heading and entry shall be substituted namely:- No. of post 2 26 (2016) (b) against the post of Chief General Manager (Administration & Human Resource), in column 2, for the heading and entry, the following heading and entry shall be substituted namely:- No. of post 2 2 (2016) SATISH CHANDRA, Member (Administration) [ADVT-III/4/Exty./375/122] Foot Note: The principal regulations were published vide notification No.NHAR-12011/1/95-Admn., dated 11th March, 1996, in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part III, Section 4, dated the 11th March, 1996 and last amended vide notification No. 11012/248/2015-Admn, dated 16th November 2015, in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part III, Section 4, dated the 19th November 2015. Explanatory Memorandum Anything done or omitted to be done prior to notification of this amendment shall not be affected by promulgation of this amendment. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
